title: Xtra Fluffy Algerian Beans Tagine
description: A charred, fluffy, and adventurous Algerian dish featuring refried beans, broil, and halal-friendly ingredients, perfect for a unique dinner experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, combine the soaked navy beans, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add 4 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 hour, or until the beans are tender.
Use an immersion blender to refry the beans until they are fluffy and charred.
Transfer the bean mixture to a baking dish and drizzle with olive oil.
Broil the beans in the oven for 10 minutes, or until they are lightly browned.
Remove the beans from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
